title.rationale: Canonical identifier for the research work.

authors.rationale: To give credit and facilitate disambiguation of contributions.

year.rationale: Helps in identifying the recency of the research.

abstract.rationale: Provides a concise overview of the research focus and findings.

doi.rationale: A unique identifier for accessing the paper online.

venue.rationale: Indicates where the research was published, establishing its context.

problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the specific issue the research aims to solve.

methodology.description: Overview of the research methods used
methodology.rationale: Details the approach taken to address the problem.

data_sets.rationale: Essential for understanding the basis of the study's findings.

architectures.rationale: Highlights the technical frameworks that underpin the research.

evaluation_metrics.description: Metrics used to evaluate the results
evaluation_metrics.rationale: Important for assessing the performance of the proposed methods.

results.rationale: Summarizes the outcomes of the study.

key_findings.rationale: Highlights the significant contributions of the paper.

challenges_identified.rationale: Provides insight into the difficulties encountered in the study.

future_directions.rationale: Guides subsequent research efforts in the field.

conclusion.description: Final thoughts and implications of the research
conclusion.rationale: Summarizes the overall impact and significance of the study.

author_contributions.rationale: Clarifies the roles of each author in the research.

main_manuscript.description: Authors who wrote the main manuscript
main_manuscript.rationale: Identifies key contributors to the writing.

figures_tables.description: Authors who prepared figures and tables
figures_tables.rationale: Acknowledges those responsible for visual content.

funding.rationale: Indicates financial support for the research work.

availability_of_data.rationale: Clarifies if the data used in the research is accessible.

ethical_considerations.rationale: Ensures compliance with ethical standards in research.

competing_interests.rationale: Maintains transparency regarding potential conflicts of interest.
